summary: Iteration 2 frontend testing for Bradwear landing page passed. Verified new Testimonials section (6 cards, names, eyebrow, headline, rating card 4.7/5.0, disclaimer), Navbar Testimoni link, LazyHeroCanvas IntersectionObserver wrapper, and all regression flows (5 features, 16+ gallery items, 4 download steps, 5 FAQ + accordion toggle, footer contact links, 5 Play Store CTAs). Mobile (390x844) verified: lazy canvas mounts, testimonials stack vertically. 50/51 raw test assertions passed; the 1 'fail' was an assertion-script issue (inner_text returns the CSS-uppercased rendered text 'TESTIMONI PENGGUNA' while the source string is correctly 'Testimoni Pengguna') — not a code defect.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 938 lines — consider splitting Testimonials/Hero/Navbar/Footer into separate component files for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

Console warning during render: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly' — minor framer-motion useScroll/whileInView container warning, non-blocking but worth investigating.
WebGL 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' performance warning from three.js; acceptable but the lazy-mount already mitigates first-paint cost.
seed_data_creation: None — testimonials are hardcoded in App.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified LazyHeroCanvas (IntersectionObserver-based, rootMargin 200px) renders the canvas in initial viewport on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Testimonials section has 6 cards (testimonial-card-0..5) with names: Rifqi A., Dewi S., Agus P., Putri N., Bagus W., Lina H. Average rating computed = 4.7/5.0. All 5 Play Store CTAs (nav-cta-download, hero-cta-download, download-cta-top, download-cta-bottom, footer-cta-download) link to https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bradwear.app. Note: Testimonials eyebrow uses CSS uppercase transform — source text is 'Testimoni Pengguna' but inner_text() returns 'TESTIMONI PENGGUNA'.
